memory.query: fix langgraph pydantic v1 warning on python 3.14

results.title: Added optional real LangGraph adapter path
results.content: Continued Phase 2.1 by upgrading LangGraphExecutorAdapter from metadata-only to an optional real adapter path. Added generic runtime attr loading, graph runtime StateGraph loader, and adapter behavior that uses real langgraph.graph.StateGraph when available while safely falling back to InternalGraphExecutor otherwise. Added targeted runtime tests with fake StateGraph coverage and verified with UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run ruff check ., uv run mypy src, and uv run pytest (77 passed).

results.title: Fixed mypy type error in verification node and untyped function in rbac
results.content: Resolved a mypy type assignment error in src/minder/graph/nodes/verification.py by declaring failure_kind as Optional[str] at the method start. Also added type hints to the rbac decorator wrapper in src/minder/auth/rbac.py to satisfy --check-untyped-defs.

results.title: Python 3.14 baseline upgrade
results.content: Upgraded minder from Python 3.12 to 3.14. Updated .python-version to 3.14, raised requires-python in pyproject.toml and uv.lock to >=3.14, switched docker/Dockerfile.sandbox to python:3.14-slim, and updated planning docs that referenced 3.12. Recreated the uv-managed .venv on CPython 3.14.3 with uv sync --python 3.14.3. Verified the upgrade with uv run ruff check ., uv run mypy src, and uv run pytest; all passed with 85 tests green on Python 3.14.3.

results.title: Git branch for recaptcha locale patch
results.content: Created branch codex/recaptcha-locale and committed the GoogleRecaptcha locale propagation change as d4c070d4 with message Pass locale into GoogleRecaptcha. Pre-commit ran lint-staged with prettier and eslint --fix successfully before commit.

results.title: Compose runtime activation uses auto runtimes with safe fallback
results.content: Enabled langgraph, litellm, and llama-cpp-python in the Minder dev stack. Compose now sets explicit orchestration and model-path env vars, MinderGraph instantiates Qwen/OpenAI runtimes with runtime=auto, and server startup prints a runtime summary. Hardened QwenLocalLLM, QwenEmbeddingProvider, and OpenAIFallbackLLM so provider initialization or network failures fall back cleanly instead of crashing boot, seed scripts, or tests.
